/usr/bin/cc  -O3 -flto -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/windham.dir/frontend.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/Argon2/argon2.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/Argon2/blake2b.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/Argon2/core.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/Argon2/encoding.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/Argon2/opt.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/Argon2/thread.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/speck/speck.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/SHA256/sha256.c.o CMakeFiles/windham.dir/library/tiny_AES_c/aes.c.o -o windham  -ldevmapper -lm
